_comment: External actor meeting pools. Actor names from problem JSONs are matched to an archetype by keyword. Effects ops: budget, approval, heat, trust_domain {id,n}, agenda_domain {id,n} , scandal_shield_today (today's decision scandal_risk halved), spin_today (today's decision approval loss softened +3), reveal_scheming (verifies whether today's recommendation is honest). Optional risk {chance, tier, title}.

union.label: ORGANIZED LABOR
greeting: Governor. My members are watching how you handle this one. Let's talk before they decide for themselves.
I represent four thousand angry people, Governor. Today, I can be your translator — or their megaphone.

offers.label: BUY LABOR PEACE
offers.desc: A 'solidarity fund' contribution keeps the rank and file calm, whatever you decide today.
offers.decline_note: Word gets around: -2%

offers.label: PUBLIC ENDORSEMENT
offers.desc: The union endorses your administration on camera. It costs concessions the budget will feel.
offers.decline_note: No hard feelings. Yet.

offers.label: SHOP-FLOOR WHISPERS
offers.desc: The members hear everything — including what your own people say when you leave the room.
offers.decline_note: Suit yourself.

offers.label: WILDCAT SUPPRESSION
offers.desc: We keep the radical elements off the picket line. It requires a modest investment in our internal security.
offers.decline_note: The radicals take the microphone.

offers.label: PREFERRED CONTRACTOR STATUS
offers.desc: Steer the next municipal contract to our members. The city gets reliable labor, we get a cut of the overhead.
offers.decline_note: We will remember who favors the outsiders.

offers.label: THE GRIEVANCE DOSSIER
offers.desc: A comprehensive list of every city employee who has been skimming. Yours to use, or ours to bury.
offers.decline_note: Ignorance is a luxury you can no longer afford.

accept_line: Pleasure doing business, Governor. My members will hear good things.
decline_line: I'll tell them you were... busy.

business.label: PRIVATE CAPITAL
greeting: Governor, I'll be brief — my time bills by the minute. There's a way today goes well for both of us.
Lovely office. It'd be a shame if the business community lost confidence in its occupant.

offers.label: A GENEROUS DONATION
offers.desc: A civic-minded contribution to the city's discretionary fund. No strings. Well — one string.
offers.decline_note: Your loss, Governor.

offers.label: BORROW THEIR PR FIRM
offers.desc: Their crisis-communications team makes today's decision land softer, whichever way you go.
offers.accept_note: -30M · backlash softened · scandal risk halved today
offers.decline_note: They said you'd say that.

offers.label: JOBS ANNOUNCEMENT
offers.desc: They announce an expansion beside you at the podium. The optics are excellent; the tax breaks are not.
offers.decline_note: The expansion goes to a rival city: -1%

offers.label: ZONING EXPEDITION
offers.desc: Fast-track our latest development. The city gets a shiny new district, we get to bypass the environmental review.
offers.decline_note: The review board takes its time.

offers.label: LOBBYING BLITZ
offers.desc: Our consultants will drown out the noise on this issue. Your approval ratings will thank us, eventually.
offers.decline_note: The noise gets louder, Governor.

offers.label: OFFSHORE CONSULTING
offers.desc: A discreet retainer for our subsidiary. It solves your cash flow problem and ours simultaneously.
offers.decline_note: A missed opportunity for synergy.

accept_line: My people will call your people. This is the start of something profitable.
decline_line: I admire principles, Governor. Expensive hobby.

media.label: THE PRESS
greeting: Off the record, Governor? Nothing is ever off the record. But today I'm selling, not buying.
I have two versions of tomorrow's front page. Want to know what decides which one runs?

offers.label: THE FRIENDLY INTERVIEW
offers.desc: A sit-down with sympathetic framing. Your side of today's story, told properly.
offers.decline_note: The hostile version writes itself.

offers.label: BUY THE TIP-OFF
offers.desc: They know what their newsroom is sitting on — and whose advice in your building smells wrong.
offers.decline_note: Ignorance is a choice, Governor.

offers.label: PICK A PUBLIC FIGHT
offers.desc: Feud with them on purpose. Your base loves it. The press corps does not forget.
offers.decline_note: Probably wise.

offers.label: EXCLUSIVE LEAK
offers.desc: We bury the opposition's latest scandal in exchange for exclusive access to your next policy rollout.
offers.decline_note: The opposition's scandal runs on page one.

offers.label: EDITORIAL BOARD DINNER
offers.desc: A private dinner with our publishers. The resulting editorial will be surprisingly favorable to your agenda.
offers.decline_note: The editorial board remains unconvinced.

offers.label: MANUFACTURED DISTRACTION
offers.desc: We will run a sensational but ultimately harmless story tomorrow. It will completely eclipse today's controversy.
offers.accept_note: -25M · backlash softened · scandal risk halved today
offers.decline_note: The controversy remains the lead story.

accept_line: Always a pleasure, Governor. Do read tomorrow's edition.
decline_line: Quote: 'the Governor declined to comment.' They never learn.

legal.label: LAW & OVERSIGHT
greeting: Governor. I'm required to note this meeting in my log. What we discuss, however, has some... latitude.
I don't make house calls, Governor. Consider this a professional courtesy — the last free one.

offers.label: PROCEDURAL BLESSING
offers.desc: Whatever you decide today gets stamped 'reviewed and compliant'. Paper armor — but armor.
offers.decline_note: Then we do it by the book. The whole book.

offers.label: THE QUIET AUDIT
offers.desc: A discreet review of your own administration. You'd be surprised what turns up. Or perhaps not.
offers.decline_note: As you wish. Some things prefer the dark.

offers.label: DE-PRIORITIZE THE FILE
offers.desc: Your file moves to the bottom of a very tall stack. Entirely procedural. Entirely deniable.

risk.title: Oversight Official Admits Pressure From City Hall

offers.decline_note: Noted. For the record.

offers.label: STATUTORY LOOPHOLE
offers.desc: We found a technicality that exempts today's decision from standard oversight. It is entirely legal, mostly.
offers.decline_note: We will apply the statute as written. Strictly.

offers.label: WITNESS RELOCATION
offers.desc: A key witness in the ongoing investigation has suddenly developed a desire to move out of state. We can facilitate.
offers.decline_note: The witness remains available for testimony.

offers.label: PREEMPTIVE RETAINER
offers.desc: Secure our firm's services before the inevitable lawsuits begin. We will handle the paperwork, and the witnesses.
offers.accept_note: -50M · verifies today's advice · Finance feels traded away (-4 trust)
offers.decline_note: We wish you the best of luck in court.

accept_line: This meeting never required a follow-up. Good day, Governor.

religious.label: FAITH COMMUNITY
greeting: Peace upon this office, Governor — though I suspect it sees little of it. The congregation asks about you.
I prayed about this meeting, Governor. Then I scheduled it anyway. Some things need both.

offers.label: A WORD FROM THE PULPIT
offers.desc: This week's sermon mentions your name kindly. Millions of ears, zero invoices — only a favor owed.
offers.decline_note: The pulpit speaks regardless. Choose its words wisely.

offers.label: FUND THE CHARITY DRIVE
offers.desc: The city co-sponsors their relief program. Genuine good — and genuinely good television.
offers.decline_note: The congregation notices: -1%

offers.label: WHAT THEY HEAR IN CONFIDENCE
offers.desc: People tell the faithful what they'd never tell the press — including people on your payroll.
offers.decline_note: Some burdens you'll carry alone, then.

offers.label: MORAL COVER
offers.desc: We will publicly frame your controversial decision as a necessary moral sacrifice. The faithful will understand.
offers.decline_note: The congregation will judge the action on its own merits.

offers.label: SACRED LAND ACQUISITION
offers.desc: The city sells us the abandoned waterfront parcel at a discount. We build a community center, you get our blessing.
offers.decline_note: The waterfront remains in secular hands.

offers.label: THE CONFESSIONAL NETWORK
offers.desc: Our clergy hear things. We can provide a summary of the moral failings of your closest advisors.
offers.decline_note: Some secrets are best left between the faithful and the divine.

accept_line: Go in peace, Governor. We will speak of you gently. This week.
decline_line: I will pray for your judgment. It appears to need it.

criminal.label: THE OTHER ECONOMY
greeting: Relax, Governor. If I wanted trouble, you'd already have it. I'm here because we have a shared interest.
No bodyguards? Brave. Or well-informed. Either way — let's talk like businessmen.

offers.label: NO-QUESTIONS LIQUIDITY
offers.desc: A briefcase. Unmarked. The kind of money that solves today and complicates forever.

risk.title: Governor's Meeting With Known Criminal Figure Exposed

offers.decline_note: Door's always open. Mine, not yours.

offers.label: QUIET STREETS
offers.desc: Tonight, nothing happens anywhere in this city without their say-so. Including against you.
offers.decline_note: Streets stay noisy, then.

offers.label: EARS IN EVERY WALL
offers.desc: They know who in your building talks, and to whom, and for how much.
offers.decline_note: Funny. Your predecessor said no too. Once.

offers.label: UNTRACEABLE CAMPAIGN FUNDS
offers.desc: A substantial donation to your reelection war chest. It comes from a foundation that does not technically exist.
offers.decline_note: Campaigns are expensive. We are merely generous.

offers.label: RIVAL SUPPRESSION
offers.desc: Your most vocal political opponent will suddenly find themselves dealing with a series of unfortunate, distracting legal troubles.
offers.decline_note: Your opponent remains remarkably healthy and vocal.

offers.label: MUTUAL ASSURANCE
offers.desc: We have compiled a rather detailed file on your deputy mayor. Consider it an insurance policy for our continued cooperation.
offers.decline_note: The file remains in our safe. For now.

accept_line: Smart. We'll be in touch — you won't see us, but we'll be in touch.
decline_line: Principles. They make such interesting funerals.

political.label: THE OPPOSITION
greeting: Governor. Let's skip the part where we pretend to like each other. I have votes you need.
My caucus smells blood in the water. I can feed them — or I can distract them. Your move.

offers.label: A QUIET TRUCE
offers.desc: The opposition sits out today's news cycle. Their silence has a price tag and an expiry date.
offers.decline_note: They sharpen the knives: -2%

offers.label: TRADE INTELLIGENCE
offers.desc: They track your cabinet more closely than you do. An exchange of files — yours for theirs.
offers.decline_note: Stay blind, then. It suits you.

offers.label: COALITION VOTES
offers.desc: Their bloc backs your next initiative — for committee seats your allies currently warm.
offers.accept_note: -20M, +4% · an ally feels traded away (-6 trust)
offers.decline_note: Enjoy governing alone.

offers.label: DISTRICT PORK BARREL
offers.desc: We support your bill if you redirect a modest infrastructure grant to our home district. The voters will be thrilled.
offers.decline_note: Our district will remember this slight.

offers.label: THE WHIP COUNT
offers.desc: We know exactly how every council member will vote on today's measure, and what it will take to change their minds.
offers.accept_note: -25M · verifies today's advice · Military Liaison grows bolder (+3 agenda)
offers.decline_note: You will vote blind, then.

offers.label: OFFER A SCAPEGOAT
offers.desc: We will publicly blame a minor, expendable official for the current controversy. It will cost you a resignation, but save your approval.
offers.decline_note: The controversy remains firmly attached to your office.

accept_line: A pleasure. I'll deny this meeting ever happened — professionally, you understand.
decline_line: I'll remember this conversation at the recall hearings.

community.label: CIVIL SOCIETY
greeting: Thank you for actually taking the meeting, Governor. Most of your predecessors sent interns.
We're not here to shout. We're here because shouting hasn't worked. Yet.

offers.label: JOINT TOWN HALL
offers.desc: Stand with them in a packed gymnasium and take real questions. Risky, human, memorable.

risk.title: Town Hall Heckler Steals the Evening News

offers.decline_note: We'll hold it without you. -1%

offers.label: FUND THE PILOT PROGRAM
offers.desc: Their grassroots program, your logo on it. Cheap goodwill that actually does some good.
offers.decline_note: We'll crowdfund. Slower, but cleaner.

offers.label: THE GROUND TRUTH
offers.desc: They live where your policies land. Their read on today's options is unpolished and unbought.
offers.decline_note: Your loss. We see everything from down here.

offers.label: ORGANIZED PETITION DRIVE
offers.desc: We will mobilize thousands of signatures in your favor, drowning out the opposition's noise. We just need a small grant for outreach.
offers.decline_note: The opposition's noise will go unchallenged.

offers.label: PROTECTED WHISTLEBLOWER
offers.desc: One of your contractors is cutting corners. We have the proof, and the witness, if you are willing to look the other way on our zoning request.
offers.accept_note: -15M · verifies today's advice · Urban Planning grows bolder (+4 trust)
offers.decline_note: The contractor continues to cut corners.

offers.label: TARGETED BOYCOTT
offers.desc: We will organize a boycott of the businesses opposing your policy. It will hurt them, and it will make you look strong.
offers.decline_note: The businesses will continue to fund your opposition.

accept_line: We'll hold you to it, Governor. Politely. At first.
decline_line: Noted. We have long memories and longer mailing lists.

fixer.label: A USEFUL STRANGER
greeting: You don't know me, Governor. That's rather the point of people like me.
I solve problems for a living. Yours are showing.

offers.label: MAKE TODAY GO SMOOTHLY
offers.desc: Calls get made. Favors get spent. Today's decision lands softer than it should.
offers.decline_note: You know where to find me. You don't, actually. I'll find you.

offers.label: A SECOND OPINION
offers.desc: They've already read everyone in your building. For a fee, so can you.
offers.decline_note: Confidence is cheap. Information isn't.

offers.label: EVIDENCE SANITIZATION
offers.desc: The digital trail leading to today's decision is messy. I can ensure the relevant servers experience a convenient outage.
offers.decline_note: The digital trail remains intact.

offers.label: MANUFACTURED OUTRAGE
offers.desc: I can arrange for a minor, highly visible protest against your opponent tomorrow. It will dominate the news cycle.
offers.decline_note: The news cycle will belong to your opponents.

offers.label: AGGRESSIVE DEBT COLLECTION
offers.desc: That vendor who has been overcharging the city. I know people who can persuade them to issue a full refund, plus a consulting fee to you.
offers.decline_note: The vendor will continue to overcharge.

accept_line: Consider it handled. Consider me forgotten.
decline_line: A careful one. They usually last longer. Usually.
